description_long: This is a DeWalt cordless electric drill, predominantly black with yellow accents and branding. The drill features a robust plastic and rubberized body for grip and durability, with visible wear and scuff marks indicating frequent use. The front section houses a metallic chuck with a hexagonal driver bit attached, suitable for driving screws or bolts. The handle is ergonomically shaped, with a visible trigger button and a battery pack at the base, labeled as a 20V lithium-ion unit. Ventilation slots are present on the motor housing to prevent overheating during operation. The drill's overall design is compact and portable, making it ideal for construction, repair, or DIY tasks in urban environments.
description: A well-used DeWalt cordless electric drill with a black and yellow body, visible trigger, battery pack, and attached driver bit. The drill shows signs of wear and features ventilation slots and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the DeWalt branding, trigger, battery pack, and attached driver bit.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the handle, battery pack, and the absence of branding or bit details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying additional labels, ventilation slots, and the full length of the drill bit.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the drill bit, chuck, and the top of the battery pack.
